input.specs: custom drawing, tolerance according to drawing
input.functions: structural support, assembly connection, replacement component
input.customization: CNC machining, anodizing, laser marking, drawing-based production
input.leadTime: 7-15 days for prototype, 20-30 days for bulk order
input.packaging: foam protection, anti-scratch bag, export carton
input.targetBuyers: equipment manufacturers, maintenance suppliers, engineering buyers
input.notes: Buyer should provide 2D/3D drawings and tolerance requirements.

outputs.productBrief:
产品定位: CNC Machined Aluminum Part
产品中心词: machined part
核心属性: precision, anodized, custom tolerance
目标买家: equipment manufacturers, maintenance suppliers, engineering buyers
outputs.title: Factory Supply precision anodized custom tolerance machined part CNC component for automation equipment
outputs.bullets:
1. Procurement Fit: suitable for engineering buyers sourcing drawing-based CNC components.
2. Product Value: 6061 or 7075 aluminum options support structural and assembly applications.
3. Customization Support: CNC machining, anodizing, laser marking, and tolerance control follow drawings.
4. Order Execution: MOQ 100 pcs with prototype review and staged lead time.
5. Market Confidence: ISO 9001 factory management information can support supplier evaluation.
outputs.faq:
Q1: What files do you need?
A1: 2D or 3D drawings and tolerance requirements are needed.

Q2: Can you make prototypes?
A2: Prototype can be arranged after drawing review.

Q3: How do you protect parts during shipping?
A3: Foam protection, anti-scratch bag, and export carton can be used.
outputs.qualityCheck:
质检总评: 通过
通过项: 符合工业品采购逻辑；没有虚构客户案例或销量。
警告项: 报价前必须确认图纸和公差。
需修改项: 无
